description: Subsidiary A has an 'Intercompany Loan Receivable' from Subsidiary B. This must be reconciled with Subsidiary B's 'Intercompany Loan Payable' to A.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the ending balance and transaction detail for the loan receivable from Subsidiary A's books.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gets the loan receivable details.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the ending balance and transaction detail for the loan payable from Subsidiary B's books.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gets the loan payable details.

nodes.task_description: Compare the balances and transactions, including accrued interest, to identify any discrepancies.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds that Subsidiary B has not yet accrued for the current month's interest, causing a mismatch.

nodes.task_description: Instruct Subsidiary B to post the interest accrual entry so the accounts will match for consolidation.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sends an instruction to the accountant at Subsidiary B.
